zh.lifeSummary: 當Edward Thurston II於1621年1月6日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾恩波利受洗時，他的父親Adam Thurston II30歲，母親Ellen Wood31歲。他於1647年6月16日與Elizabeth Mott在美國羅得島紐波特波斯姆斯結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1706年2月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特紐波特享年85歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特紐波特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edward Thurston II于1621年1月6日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾恩波利受洗时，他的父亲Adam Thurston II30岁，母亲Ellen Wood31岁。他于1647年6月16日与Elizabeth Mott在美国罗德岛州紐波特波斯姆斯结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1706年2月28日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特紐波特享年85岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加羅德 易曼德紐波特紐波特。

nameMeanings.name: Thurston
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: from the Anglo-Norman, Anglo-Scandinavian, and Middle English personal name Thurstan, Thorsten (Old Norse Thórsteinn, Thorsten, Anglicized as Old English Thurstān; see Thorstensen ).
habitational name from Thurston in Suffolk, so called from the genitive case of the Old Norse personal name Thóri (see Thor ) + Old English tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

variants.name: Tustin
meanings: English (Worcestershire, Warwickshire and Gloucestershire): variant of   Thurston  .

variants.name: Thorstensen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Thorsten, a variant of Thorstein, Old Norse Thórsteinn, composed of the name of the god Thórr (see Thor ) + steinn ‘stone, rock’, hence meaning ‘altar of Thor’ or perhaps ‘hammer of Thor’.

nameMeanings.name: Edward
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

historicEvents.title: Providence Founded
historicEvents.description: In 1636 Providence is founded as a settlement for Rhode Island by Roger Williams

historicEvents.title: First Baptist Church
historicEvents.description: Roger Williams establishes the First Baptist Church of Rhode Island in Providence during 1638.

The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

The Colony of Rhode Island and Providence Plantations, as it was from June 22, 1703, when it created the counties of Providence Plantations and Rhode Island, to June 16, 1729, when Providence Plantations County was renamed Providence, Rhode Island County was renamed Newport, and Kings County was created from Providence.

en.lifeSummary: When Edward Thurston II was christened on 6 January 1621, in Thornbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Adam Thurston II, was 30 and his mother, Ellen Wood, was 31. He married Elizabeth Mott on 16 June 1647, in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 28 February 1706, in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, at the age of 85, and was buried in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edward Thurston II a été baptisé le 6 janvier 1621, à Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Adam Thurston II, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Ellen Wood, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Mott le 16 juin 1647, à Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 28 février 1706, à Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterré à Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edward Thurston II am 6. Januar 1621 in Thornbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom getauft wurde, war sein Vater Adam Thurston II 30 und seine Mutter Ellen Wood 31. Er hat am 16. Juni 1647 in Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Vereinigte Staaten Elizabeth Mott geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Februar 1706 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America und wurde in Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Thurston II è stato battezzato il 6 gennaio 1621 nel Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Adam Thurston II, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Ellen Wood, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Mott il 16 giugno 1647, nel Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 28 febbraio 1706, nel Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolto a Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Edward Thurston IIが1621年1月6日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアソルンブリーで洗礼を受けた時，父Adam Thurston IIは30歳，母Ellen Woodは31歳であった。1647年6月16日にアメリカ合衆国ロードアイランド州ニュープオルトポルトスモウスでElizabeth Mottと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1706年2月28日にイギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトニュープオルトで85歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカロード イスランドニュープオルトニュープオルトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Edward Thurston II(이)가 1621년 1월 6일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 토른버이에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam Thurston II(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Ellen Wood(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1647년 6월 16일 미국 로드아일랜드 주 뉴포트 포츠모우스에서 Elizabeth Mott(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1706년 2월 28일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 뉴포트에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 호드 이슬랜드 뉴포트 뉴포트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edward Thurston II foi batizado em 6 de janeiro de 1621, em Thornbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Adam Thurston II, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Wood, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Mott em 16 de junho de 1647, em Portsmouth, Newport, Rhode Island, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de fevereiro de 1706, em Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America, com 85 anos, e foi sepultado em Newport, Newport, Rhode Island, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edward Thurston II был крещен 6 января 1621 г. в местности таурнбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Adam Thurston II было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Wood, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Mott 16 июня 1647 г. в местности порцмоут, нюпорт, Род-Айленд, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 28 февраля 1706 г. в местности нюпорт, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 85 лет и был похоронен в местности нюпорт, нюпорт, род исланд, бритиш колоняль амирика.
